creator: jmvandry@gmail.com
text:
running it with debug, we can see that a Requested file is not available

time /usr/libexec/phttpget update4.freebsd.org 10.2-RELEASE/amd64/f/f006a15124825bd5a5f80d510331a6e4969071de4e0201b5391a74e47d37612d.gz
phttpget: Connection failure

user    0m0.001s
sys     0m0.002s

I think the bug is with phttpget which timeout is too small. But the web server is really slow to served this file

time /usr/libexec/phttpget update4.freebsd.org 10.2-RELEASE/amd64/f/f008ab272d1062d557c56f66252936ef9c300b1ce24f3f5c5a9c8baff5d2d1e6.gz
